title: Fix testimonial typo in PlayerTestimonials quote
problem_summary: Michael J.'s quote repeats the phrase 'the player' and reads awkwardly.
goal: Replace the duplicate phrase with clearer wording that keeps the testimonial natural and aligned with the site's tone.
acceptance_criteria: Quote no longer repeats 'the player' unnecessarily
App builds successfully with npm run build
Home page loads locally after the change
Updated testimonial text appears correctly on the rendered page
qa_plan: Confirm testimonial text renders with corrected wording
Confirm no console-breaking behavior from the change
system_impact: Low risk. Copy change on the home page testimonial component only.
stop_conditions: Testimonial content is loaded from an unexpected remote source
notes: Suggested replacement: 'The coaches care about the player, not just the performance.'
